description_long: This helicopter features a compact, rounded fuselage with a dark red and brown color scheme, accented by metallic and olive green elements. Two large, horizontally mounted propellers are positioned on either side of the main body, supported by robust mechanical arms. The cockpit is enclosed, with a small, circular window on each side and a slightly raised roof. The front is adorned with a prominent anchor hanging from a chain, suggesting a hybrid design for both air and water operations. The rear includes a flat, green platform or ramp, and the sides are lined with cylindrical bumpers, reminiscent of those found on boats. The overall design blends nautical and aviation elements, giving it a unique, steampunk-inspired appearance.
description: A compact, steampunk-style helicopter with dual side propellers, a boat-like hull, and a prominent front anchor, featuring a mix of red, brown, and metallic colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual propellers, rounded cockpit, and the green rear platform.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cylindrical bumpers, anchor chain, and side window.
description_view_2: Direct front view with a clear look at the anchor, propellers, and hull shape.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the rear platform, bumpers, and side window.
attribute_rotor_blades: There are two main rotors, each with two long, straight blades made of metal, colored gray with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Not visible; no traditional tail rotor is present, as the design uses side-mounted main rotors.
attribute_landing_skids: No traditional landing skids; instead, the helicopter has a boat-like hull with a flat bottom and a rear ramp/platform.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Two small, circular side windows are visible, framed in metal, with no visible tint or markings.
